taskDescription: Complete the crossword on Xenobiotics, Oxidative Stress, and Antioxidants (BI12.1-3).

words.clue: Toxic reactive metabolite of paracetamol formed by CYP2E1
Tripeptide antioxidant composed of glutamate, cysteine, and glycine
Enzyme family responsible for most Phase I oxidation reactions
Phase II conjugation reaction that adds glucuronic acid
Enzyme that converts superoxide radical to hydrogen peroxide
Vitamin that acts as a chain-breaking antioxidant in cell membranes
Foreign chemical substance not normally found in the body
Reactive oxygen species formed by one-electron reduction of oxygen
